caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back in a ponytail wears a black jacket with a red and yellow "M" logo on the chest and a light blue medical face mask. In an indoor setting with neutral-colored walls and a brown sofa, she is seen from the side, facing right. A man wearing blue scrubs and a green medical mask enters the scene from the right, partially visible as he interacts with her. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a similar position while the man moves closer. On-screen overlays appear in each frame, featuring a purple silhouette of a person and the text "Day 5" inside a purple circle, as well as the text "Sim Week" accompanied by a small icon of a medical equipment stand. The interaction occurs in a professional or educational environment, with the focus on the two masked individuals.
